verse_text: Thus the Lord spoke to Moses face to face, as a man speaks to his friend. Then he would return to the camp, but his servant Joshua the son of Nun, a young man, did not depart from the tabernacle.

links.context: **33:11-23** — [[EXO.33:11]]–23; 34:4–6, 8: These verses are read as the second reading during the Feast of the Transfiguration.
